column2: this algorithm adapts the distributions of mutation (`F`) and crossover (`CR`) rates using success-based history (Lehmer mean). This converges to optimal parameters for the specific function landscape automatically.

3.  **External Archive**: A historical archive of inferior solutions is maintained to preserve diversity. This allows the difference vectors in the mutation step to reference older positions
column2: preventing premature convergence and enhancing the global search capability.

column2: it triggers a restart while keeping the best found solution (Elitism). This effectively handles multimodal functions by exploring different basins of attraction within the time limit.

column4: minimizing the Python interpreter overhead which is critical for the ""limited time"" constraint.
